allow: PowerShell(cd "C:\\ia\\Projet2"; Start-Process python -ArgumentList "-m uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/" -TimeoutSec 5; "Serveur OK - statut $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Erreur: $_" })

PowerShell(cd "C:\\ia\\Projet2"; $job = Start-Job -ScriptBlock { Set-Location "C:\\ia\\Projet2"; python -m uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Serveur OK - statut $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { "Erreur: $_" })
